message:
test: massive expansion of integration and verification test suites

Add and extend ~130 test files across the franken-engine test
suite covering new verification domains and hardening existing
coverage:

Key additions:
- FRX track sprint tests (tracks B-F): compiler FRIR spine,
  JS runtime MVP, WASM hybrid router, verification fuzz/formal
  coverage, toolchain ecosystem adoption
- FRX governance: lane charters (adoption, compiler, optimization,
  toolchain, verification, governance evidence), program
  constitution, release operations gatebook, test logging schema
- Parser verification: arena phase1, benchmark protocol, CI gates,
  corpus promotion, correctness/performance promotion gates,
  cross-arch repro matrix, diagnostics rubric, differential
  nightly governance, evidence indexer, readiness dossier,
  grammar closure backlog, hermetic wrapper, one-lever
  optimization, operator runbook, oracle gate, property
  regression, regression bisector, supremacy criteria, third-party
  rerun kit, user impact dashboard/alarms
- RGC verification packs: CLI operator workflow, fault injection
  chaos, performance regression, runtime semantics, security
  enforcement, statistical validation, verification coverage
  matrix, cross-platform matrix, operator incident runbook
- Engine core tests: adversarial campaign generator/gate CLI,
  benchmark denominator, capability witness publication,
  controller interference, delegation chain, execution
  orchestrator, flamegraph pipeline enrichment, governance
  scorecard/audit ledger, IFC conformance/release gate,
  IR contract, migration contract, module compatibility matrix,
  observability channel model, one-lever policy, opportunity
  matrix, safe mode startup, shadow evaluation gate, and more

Also expanded many existing tests with additional scenarios
and boundary condition coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
